Two apple trees at the edge of some brush about halfway between KK and Caulfield. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
2046 E Iron St, Milwaukee, WI 53207, USA
The apple tree is just off the Oak Leaf trail, across from a pier. As of August 5th, 2020, the fruit was *almost* ripe-- a little tart, but with a good flavor. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
3420 S Illinois Ave, Milwaukee, WI 53207, USA
The grapes are along the edge of the woods, not far from the parking lot between the convent and Meyer Hall. Currently (as of July) they are not ripe, so can't speak to quality. Access: Private.

The pear tree is located on a strip of lawn between Kiley Hall and Clare Hall, along with several other trees. Access: Private.
